horizon: Season of the First Wish — the well is open, and it keeps books
goals: The well's ledger becomes real: a wish drawn up is a debt recorded, never granted on the spot (Decree 5). The ledger is world data — propose the schema through the proper gate (needs-ep-review) so it outlives any one telling; until then Winsome's filing is the ledger of record
The visitor's bridge wish (#108) is the ledger's first entry: owed, not built — a bridge over the mill stream is exactly the kind of debt a town saves up for, and the saving-up is the story

Finish converting wander into purpose (#62): the remaining wander-only residents get their stories performed in clusters of two or three, the way Cobble met the bread cart and Pip counted the crumbs — stories already in the data, never invented fresh

The town has earned its first festival: the well finished, the arch standing, the lane caught up. When it comes, it happens in public, stage by stage, every guild with a part — and it centers on what the town built, not on what it was given
Keep the lane in step with the Chronicle as new days land (Decree 4): the backlog is cleared for the first time — do not let a new one form
